title: callitriche obtusangula subvar. cophocarpa
intro: Callitriche obtusangula subvar. cophocarpa, also known as the annual water starwort, is a submerged aquatic plant that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Callitriche obtusangula subvar. cophocarpa are often used in infusions or teas, and can also be dried and used in capsule or tablet form.
